DTR  |  Listen to a Classroom Conversation
LCC-HS9-L3-1400P-HSSCIENG910-MEC-API-02 • HS Science: Engineering Design 9–10 • Engineering Design

The Flood and the Field

Click  🎧  to listen.
Listen to a conversation between a girl and a boy. Listen carefully. You will hear the conversation only once. After listening, you will answer some questions.
Listen to the Conversation
1QUESTION 1: What are the students trying to decide?
2QUESTION 2: Why does the boy agree that the second exhibit belongs in the showcase?
3QUESTION 3: What do both exhibits have in common, according to the students?
Choose the best answer for each question. You may change your answers before submitting.
Answer all 3 questions to submit.
SMART SUPPORT:
Go back to the conversation. How do the girl’s descriptions of each exhibit and the boy’s closing statement together establish what the two exhibits share and why that makes them the right choice? Explain how each piece of evidence supports its conclusion.
CA ELD PI.A.1, PI.A.3, PI.B.5  |  HS-ETS1-2  |  HS Science: Engineering Design 9–10
